title: Raccoon Removal in Peekskill, NY | $900 - $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Peekskill, Westchester. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts serving all Peekskill neighborhoods. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with raccoons in your Peekskill home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services throughout Peekskill and greater Westchester County. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove raccoons and prevent future infestations in attics, chimneys, crawl spaces, and other vulnerable areas.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Westchester County, we understand the unique wildlife challenges Peekskill residents face along the Hudson River corridor. Our team responds quickly, offers transparent pricing between $900-$4,000 depending on infestation severity, and provides comprehensive exclusion services to keep raccoons out for good.
localContext: Peekskill's historic neighborhoods near the Hudson River, wooded areas around Blue Mountain Reservation, and older homes in downtown districts create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. Properties near Bear Mountain State Park and along the waterfront are especially susceptible to wildlife intrusions requiring professional intervention.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Peekskill?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Peekskill typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points, and damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Peekskill, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Peekskill due to its proximity to the Hudson River, wooded areas, and abundance of older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. They're particularly active in spring when seeking denning sites and in fall when searching for winter shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Peekskill property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Peekskill service calls within 24 hours. Removal timeframes vary based on the situation - simple exclusions may take 1-2 days, while infestations involving babies or extensive damage may require 3-7 days to ensure all animals are safely removed and entry points secured.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in Peekskill?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, legal methods compliant with New York State wildlife regulations. Our approach includes live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion devices, and thorough sealing of entry points. We never use harmful poisons or inhumane practices and can relocate raccoons when appropriate.
